ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer (e.g., software engineer, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the developer belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the developer left the company (if applicable) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the developer works */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the developer */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager supervising the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the repository */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit in the repository */,
  "number_of_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, refactoring) */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in lines of code */,
  "files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the issue was reported */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., urgent, high, medium, low) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "estimated_resolution_time" REAL /* Estimated time to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_ownership" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who owns the bug */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue related to the bug */,
  "ownership_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was assigned to the developer */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the bug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_ownership_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_ownership_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit being reviewed */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who performed the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was performed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the code review */,
  "review_duration" REAL /* Time taken to complete the review */,
  "number_of_findings" INTEGER /* Number of issues or findings identified in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_network_metrics" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "in_degree" REAL /* In-degree of the developer */,
  "out_degree" REAL /* Out-degree of the developer */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality of the developer */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness centrality of the developer */,
  "eigencentrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality of the developer */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the developer */,
  "pagerank" REAL /* PageRank of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the change was made */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., commit, merge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_changes_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scm_changes" (
  "scm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SCM change */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the SCM change was made */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the SCM change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the SCM change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of SCM change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scm_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scm_changes_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scr_changes" (
  "scr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SCR change */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the SCR change was made */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the SCR change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the SCR change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of SCR change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scr_changes_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scr_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msl_changes" (
  "msl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSL change */,
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the MSL change was made */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who made the MSL change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the MSL change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of MSL change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msl_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_msl_changes_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_review_metrics" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code review */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit being reviewed */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who performed the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was performed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the code review */,
  "review_duration" REAL /* Time taken to complete the review */,
  "number_of_findings" INTEGER /* Number of issues or findings identified in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewer_metrics" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who performed the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was performed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the code review */,
  "review_duration" REAL /* Time taken to complete the review */,
  "number_of_findings" INTEGER /* Number of issues or findings identified in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewer_metrics_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_times" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being resolved */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time it took to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_times_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolution_times_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
